name: WebProdDmLoadRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte_in AS (SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, RUN_CYC_NO, RUN_CYC_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE SUBJ_CD = 'PRODUCT' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle} AND CDM_LOAD_IN = 'N'), cte_xfm AS (SELECT 'FACETS' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'PRODUCT' AS SUBJ_CD, 'IDS' AS TRGT_SYS_CD, cte_in.RUN_CYC_NO AS RUN_CYC_NO, 'Y' AS CDM_LOAD_IN FROM cte_in) UPDATE A SET A.CDM_LOAD_IN = cte_xfm.CDM_LOAD_IN FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC A JOIN cte_xfm ON A.SRC_SYS_CD = cte_xfm.SRC_SYS_CD AND A.SUBJ_CD = cte_xfm.SUBJ_CD AND A.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte_xfm.TRGT_SYS_CD AND A.RUN_CYC_NO = cte_xfm.RUN_CYC_NO

Description:

DESCRIPTION:   Pulls data from PROD for  loading Max run cycle into the Data Mart

PROCESSING:

Annotations:
Job Name;
WebProdDmLoadRunCycUpd_EE
Read all the Data from IDS Prod Table; 
Pull records based on ExtractRunCycle
Set CDM_LOAD_IN to Y for SUBJ_CD = 'PRODUCT' and TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS'
Update P_RUN_CYC table
